ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., FPS, RPG, MOBA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game developer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was released */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the game */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES game_developers ("game_developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., gamer, team manager, game developer) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player's account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the player's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the team's information was last updated */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squads" (
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squad */,
  "squad_name" TEXT /* Name of the squad */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the squad */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the squad was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the squad's information was last updated */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squad leader */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the squad's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squads_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player joined the team */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team (e.g., member, captain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_squads" (
  "player_squad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-squad relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squad */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player joined the squad */,
  "role_in_squad" TEXT /* Role of the player in the squad (e.g., member, leader) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_squads_squad_id FOREIGN KEY ("squad_id") REFERENCES squads ("squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_squads_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squad */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the game */,
  "game_start_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the game started */,
  "game_end_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the game ended */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the game */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game in which the result was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_squad_id FOREIGN KEY ("squad_id") REFERENCES squads ("squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., kills, deaths, assists) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "game_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the stat was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_result_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_boons" (
  "player_boon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player boon */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "boon_name" TEXT /* Name of the boon (e.g., regeneration, fury, might) */,
  "boon_value" REAL /* Value of the boon */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the boon was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_boon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_boons_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_boons_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_boons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "leaderboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the leaderboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leaderboard */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the leaderboard was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the leaderboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard_entries" (
  "leaderboard_entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaderboard */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player on the leaderboard */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the entry was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_entries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_entries_leaderboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("leaderboard_id") REFERENCES leaderboards ("leaderboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developers" (
  "game_developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game developer */,
  "game_developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the game developer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the developer account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the developer's information was last updated */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the developer's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "game_update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game update */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "update_name" TEXT /* Name of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was released */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_updates_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_patches" (
  "game_patch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game patch */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "patch_name" TEXT /* Name of the patch */,
  "patch_description" TEXT /* Description of the patch */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the patch was released */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the patch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_patch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_patches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
